title: Choose Consultation Type Screen with Fee & Discount Logic

requirements.text: Create a 'Choose Consultation Type' screen (route: `/consultation-type/:doctorId`) that is navigated to when the user clicks 'Book Appointment' on the Doctor Profile screen. The screen must display three selectable consultation type cards: 💻 Online, 🏥 Clinic Visit, and 🏠 Home Visit. Only one type may be selected at a time. Each card must display the consultation type label, its icon, and a brief description (e.g., 'Video call with doctor', 'Visit doctor at clinic', 'Doctor visits your home'). Styling must follow the existing Medical Blue theme.
acceptanceCriteria: The screen is accessible via the route `/consultation-type/:doctorId`.
Three consultation type cards are displayed: Online, Clinic Visit, and Home Visit, each with its emoji icon and a short description.
Selecting a card visually highlights it (active state) and deselects the previously selected card.
Only one consultation type can be active at a time.
The screen follows the Medical Blue theme consistently.

requirements.text: On the 'Choose Consultation Type' screen, implement automatic fee calculation logic: (1) When 'Home Visit' is selected, add a travel fee (mock value: ₹200) to the base consultation fee and display it as a line item labelled 'Travel Fee'. (2) When any type is selected, check for and apply a corporate discount (mock: 10% off) if the user has a corporate account, displaying the discount as a line item labelled 'Corporate Discount'. (3) Check for and apply a subscription discount (mock: 15% off) if the user has an active subscription, displaying it as a line item labelled 'Subscription Discount'. Display a fee breakdown summary below the type cards showing: Base Fee, Travel Fee (Home Visit only), Corporate Discount (if applicable), Subscription Discount (if applicable), and Total Payable. Discounts should be applied sequentially on the discounted price. Styling must follow the Medical Blue theme.
acceptanceCriteria: Selecting 'Home Visit' adds a ₹200 travel fee line item to the fee breakdown.
Selecting 'Online' or 'Clinic Visit' does not show a travel fee line item.
A corporate discount line item (10% off) is shown and applied when the mock corporate flag is true.
A subscription discount line item (15% off) is shown and applied when the mock subscription flag is true.
The fee breakdown section shows: Base Fee, Travel Fee (conditional), Corporate Discount (conditional), Subscription Discount (conditional), and Total Payable.
Total Payable updates in real time when the consultation type is changed.
Fee breakdown is clearly readable and styled with the Medical Blue theme.

requirements.text: Add a prominent 'Continue' button at the bottom of the 'Choose Consultation Type' screen, styled in the Medical Blue theme. The button must be disabled until a consultation type is selected. On click, it should navigate the user to the next step in the booking flow (slot selection page at `/book-slot/:doctorId` or equivalent). Pass the selected consultation type and calculated total fee as route/query parameters to the next screen.
acceptanceCriteria: A 'Continue' button is displayed at the bottom of the screen.
The button is visually disabled when no consultation type is selected.
The button becomes active once a consultation type is selected.
Clicking 'Continue' navigates the user to the slot selection step, passing the selected consultation type and total fee as parameters.
The button is styled in the Medical Blue theme.

requirements.text: Update the 'Book Appointment' button on the Doctor Profile screen (`frontend/src/pages/PublicDoctorProfilePage.tsx`) to navigate to the new 'Choose Consultation Type' screen (`/consultation-type/:doctorId`) instead of any previous destination, passing the doctorId as a route parameter.
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking 'Book Appointment' on any Doctor Profile screen navigates to `/consultation-type/:doctorId` with the correct doctorId.
The navigation does not produce any console errors or missing-route warnings.
The route `/consultation-type/:doctorId` is registered in the root router configuration (`frontend/src/App.tsx`).

constraints: Do not modify any files listed under frontend.immutablePaths.
All fee calculation logic (travel fee, corporate discount, subscription discount) must use mock/static values on the frontend only — no backend changes required for this feature.
Styling must remain consistent with the existing Medical Blue theme throughout.
nonGoals: Real payment processing or Razorpay integration for this screen.
Real corporate account or subscription status lookup from the backend.
Building the full slot selection or patient details steps (only navigation to that step is required).
Geolocation or distance-based travel fee calculation.
